title: Actuator State
description: Current state of a single actuator, published on gh/{greenhouse_id}/actuator/{actuator}/state. Carries both the controller's `commanded` output and the `observed` readback from the HAL; the two agree in the fault-free case and diverge when the actuator is stuck/jammed. One unified shape covers on/off, variable-position, and modulating actuators: `level_pct` is null for pure on/off devices and 0–100 for variable/modulating ones. `health` reports the actuator-health monitor verdict (controller safety spec §5).

name.description: Closed set of actuators (physical-system-single.md §Outputs). This per-actuator `state` topic carries house-level actuators only; irrigation_valve is per-zone and is reported via the system-state snapshot's zones[].irrigation, not published on this topic. irrigation_valve remains in the enum because the same actuator set is reused for manual overrides and the system-state snapshot.

state.title: Actuator output state
state.description: The {on, level_pct} output shape, reused for both the commanded value and the observed readback.

on.description: Whether the actuator is energized / open.

level_pct.description: Output level for variable/modulating actuators (fan speed, vent/shade position, dimmable lights, modulating heater). Null for pure on/off devices (misters, co2_injector, irrigation_valve).

health.description: Actuator-health monitor verdict (controller safety spec §5). ok = observed tracks commanded and the climate effect is present; stuck = observed diverges from commanded; no_response = observed tracks commanded but the variable it drives shows no effect. Sustained saturation is reported separately as a setpoint_unreachable fault event, not here.

overridden.description: True when a manual override is forcing this actuator's state, bypassing its control loop (controller spec §10).
